_comment: LIBERO eval results for lerobot/xvla-libero (xVLA). Status: pending local verification. Numbers will be filled in after a reproduction run using lerobot-eval. Do NOT add numbers without a locally-verified eval run or a precise paper citation with table reference.

source.reproduction_planned: Pending — requires checkpoint inspection for camera/state spec before running lerobot-eval.

reproduction_cli.description: Re-run this benchmark inside the OpenRAL repo. ADR-0009 PR D: openral benchmark run is the canonical producer of RSkillEvalResult JSONs with reproduced_locally=true.
reproduction_cli.status: in-tree (libero_spatial); xvla on LIBERO is paper-quoted until a contributor runs the full suite locally
notes: The 'results' block on this file is still the paper snapshot (reproduced_locally=false); re-running the command above and overwriting the file with its output flips that flag.
Camera key names and state dim must be verified against the checkpoint config before running.
xVLA architecture details (action chunk size, flow-matching steps if any) TBD.

benchmark.name: LIBERO
benchmark.protocol: 10 trials per task, binary success, multi-task training

results.note: Fill in after running lerobot-eval with the xVLA checkpoint, or after extracting values from an upstream publication with exact table reference.
